name: elegy-checks
description: Local-first check registry, runner, and evidence store for Elegy.

interface.shortDescription: Run and inspect local repository checks.
interface.longDescription: Rust-first local check registry, runner, SQLite evidence store, and CI-parity mapper for agents and Elegy Copilot. Ships local-only check packs for repo hygiene, Node/TS, React/Vite, Rust, Tauri, docs, specs, agent instruction surfaces, GitHub Actions, and dependency basics.
